title: helichrysum rupestre subsp. glutinosum
intro: Helichrysum rupestre subsp. glutinosum, also known as yellow mountain everlast, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and succulent leaves. The plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum rupestre subsp. glutinosum contribute to its health benefits, including its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an extract, tincture, or essential oil, which can be applied topically or ingested in moderation to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
